title: Quarters · AgentSDK Runtime — THE FENCE & THE HARNESS

segments.subtitle: agent-garrison · non-Anthropic models · THE FENCE · THE HARNESS · 2026-06-16

beats.caption: Quarters → AgentSDK: the runtime reachable only via a non-Anthropic base URL (Ollama / Z.ai / DeepSeek / MiniMax / proxy)
beats.expectedScreen: the AgentSDK Runtime page header with a paragraph explaining it is reachable only via a non-Anthropic base URL and that Max-plan Claude stays on the Claude Code PTY runtime

beats.caption: THE FENCE — default-deny: no base URL and Anthropic hosts are BLOCKED; a non-Anthropic URL is allowed
beats.expectedScreen: the THE FENCE table with verdict rows — 'no base URL' BLOCKED, 'a non-Anthropic base URL (Ollama)' allowed, 'an Anthropic host, no acceptApiBilling' BLOCKED, the acceptApiBilling override allowed, and the settings.json #217 injection BLOCKED

beats.caption: THE HARNESS — full = the claude_code preset + project CLAUDE.md + skills; lean = a minimal string, none of that
beats.expectedScreen: the THE HARNESS cards: promptMode full shows preset claude_code, settingSources [project], CLAUDE.md loaded yes, skills mounted yes; promptMode lean shows preset none, settingSources [], CLAUDE.md no, skills no

beats.caption: Each provider carries a capability record — DeepSeek serves text + tool use only, so MCP/vision roles never route there
beats.expectedScreen: the Providers table listing ollama-local, zai-glm, deepseek, minimax, llm-proxy with base URL, vault key, what each serves, effort support, and a non-anthropic fence verdict

beats.caption: Version pins: the SDK is pinned, and the LiteLLM proxy forbids the supply-chain-compromised 1.82.7 / 1.82.8
beats.expectedScreen: the Version pins card: SDK claude-agent-sdk@0.3.179, LiteLLM proxy pin <= 1.82.6, FORBIDDEN 1.82.7, 1.82.8

segments.text: Fenced off Anthropic billing · honest per-target harness
segments.subtitle: default-deny base URL · full vs lean preset · per-provider capability records
